task_description: Apply targeted compliance and copy updates to the Zevrian site: remove unverifiable shipping claims, update private label positioning to reflect Amazon FBA wholesale business model, update FAQ answers, fix footer tagline, update meta descriptions, and flag WhatsApp placeholder.

verification.summary: Build and tests cannot be run locally (INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no npm install available). All prohibited text patterns verified via grep searches with zero matches. TypeScript syntax verified by reading all modified files. Commits pushed to main where Cloudflare Pages will auto-build and validate.
